name: RPlog_talk_Revolutions_End
title: Talk Page: Reassembling Missing Poses
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Revolutions End log. The editor SW1 Kyle works through reconstructing the log from incomplete records, first noting a missing Luke pose in round five and then discovering many more missing poses, which he laboriously fills in from an unedited log. Delede reports still missing a round-five pose just before Twila's reaction to being ordered to leave, and the contributors compare their saved logs, including one from Violet that had been posted and removed, to track down which poses were lost to network drops. The discussion is entirely editorial log-repair coordination with no in-character content.
